title: Better to Play (MVS) Dungeon (Addon)
description: A Better to Play (MVS) addon with more stuff to explore.
body:
**The MVS Dungeon Mod is a MVS addon that adds a new dimension with a new dungeon and ~25 new related rooms!**

**PLEASE NOTE!:**

This addon needs minimum **6GB RAM** because of the structure generation!

This modification needs the **MVS V1.15** and higher!

Link: [ Better to Play (MVS)](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-to-playbetter-to-play-backport-(mvsmvs-backport))

**New Item:**

**Dungeon Staff:**
A rework from the MVS Flight Staff.

This is also the main item from this modification.

**Uses:**

**Rightklick:** Evokes the structure/dungeon

**Shift + Rightklick (Air Position):** Enabelds the Void World

**Shift + Rightklick (Block Position):** Disabelds the Void World

**New Block:**

**Lucky Room Block:**

The Block with the random room generator.

**Use:**

**With a lever:** Generates the room

**How to generate the dungeon:**

You need the Dungeon Staff and enable the Void World,

You need also an activated End Portal,

Jump in the End Portal and you can spawn the dungeon!

Sleeping in a red bed is the way out (like a dream)!
